_comment: D-PC AI Providers Configuration - Manage your local and cloud AI providers. Copy this to ~/.dpc/providers.json and customize.

providers._comment: Local Ollama text provider - Fast model for regular chat queries
Local Ollama vision provider - For image analysis queries
Local Whisper transcription provider - Privacy-first voice messages (v0.13.1+)
providers._note: Provider aliases match HuggingFace model names for clarity
Privacy-first local transcription with OpenAI API fallback
providers._requirements: CUDA GPU recommended (CPU fallback available, slower)
providers._offline_mode: Model works completely offline after initial download (~3GB, cached in ~/.cache/huggingface/)
providers._vram_management: Model auto-unloads from VRAM when auto-transcribe disabled (frees ~3GB VRAM)
providers._lazy_loading: true = faster startup (model loads on first recording), false = preload on startup

_examples._comment: Example configurations for cloud providers - Add these to the providers array above

anthropic_creative._comment: High-temperature Claude for creative writing tasks
anthropic_creative._note: Higher temperature (0.9) for more creative/varied responses

anthropic_code._comment: Low-temperature Claude for precise code generation
anthropic_code._note: Lower temperature (0.2) for deterministic, precise code output

anthropic_thinking._comment: Claude Extended Thinking (v1.4+) - Claude 3.7+ and Claude 4+ support extended thinking
anthropic_thinking._note: Enables Claude's extended thinking for complex reasoning tasks
anthropic_thinking._budget_tokens: Token budget for thinking (higher = more thorough reasoning)

deepseek_r1._comment: DeepSeek R1 Thinking Model (v1.4+) - Local via Ollama with <think\> tags
deepseek_r1._note: DeepSeek R1 uses <think\>...</think\> tags for reasoning content

openai_o1._comment: OpenAI o1 Reasoning Model (v1.4+) - Uses hidden reasoning tokens
openai_o1._note: OpenAI o1 models perform reasoning internally (thinking not visible)

zai._note: Uses Anthropic-compatible endpoint (not PaaS endpoint) to avoid prepaid balance requirements
zai._thinking: All GLM models support extended thinking - enabled by default
zai._rate_limits: Concurrency-based (2-20 concurrent requests depending on model)

whisper_variants._comment: Example Whisper model variants - Aliases match HuggingFace model names
whisper_variants._note: All use the same provider type 'local_whisper' with different model identifiers

_variants._note: Full model, ~3GB, best accuracy (99 languages), ~10-13x real-time on RTX 3060
Faster variant, ~1.6GB, slightly less accuracy, ~15-20x real-time

gemini._comment: Google Gemini / AI Studio - All models are natively multimodal (vision), 1M context
gemini._setup: Get free API key at https://aistudio.google.com — set: export GEMINI_API_KEY='AIza...'
gemini._thinking: Set model to 'gemini-2.0-flash-thinking-exp' to enable thinking/reasoning mode
gemini._vision: All Gemini models support image input natively

github_models._comment: GitHub Models - Free access to GPT-4o, Llama, Phi, Mistral using GitHub token
github_models._setup: Create GitHub PAT with 'models:read' permission at https://github.com/settings/tokens — set: export GITHUB_TOKEN='ghp_...'

gigachat._comment: GigaChat by Sberbank - 1M free tokens, 128K context, strong Russian language support
_setup: 3. Install Russian CA cert (once per virtualenv):

_available_models.GigaChat-2-Max: Most capable, 128K context, supports vision + function calling

gigachat._verify_ssl: Set to false only for dev/testing. For production: install the CA cert or set ca_bundle_file path

apple_whisper_mlx._setup: Install MLX dependencies: poetry install -E mlx (macOS only)

_field_reference._comment: Reference guide for provider configuration fields

common_fields.alias: User-friendly name for the provider (must be unique)
common_fields.context_window: Optional: Override default context window size in tokens
common_fields.temperature: Optional: Model creativity/randomness (0.0-2.0, default: 0.7). Lower = deterministic, higher = creative

openai_compatible_fields.api_key: API key (plaintext - only use for local providers)
openai_compatible_fields.api_key_env: Environment variable containing API key (recommended for cloud)

anthropic_fields.api_key_env: Environment variable containing Anthropic API key (required)

zai_fields.api_key_env: Environment variable containing Z.AI API key (recommended)
zai_fields.thinking: Object with 'enabled' (bool) and 'budget_tokens' (int, default: 10000) for extended thinking

gemini_fields.api_key_env: Environment variable containing Google AI Studio API key (default: GEMINI_API_KEY)

github_models_fields.api_key_env: Environment variable containing GitHub PAT with models:read permission (default: GITHUB_TOKEN)
github_models_fields._note: Endpoint https://models.inference.ai.azure.com is always used automatically

gigachat_fields.api_key_env: Environment variable containing GigaChat authorization key (default: GIGACHAT_CREDENTIALS)
gigachat_fields.scope: API scope: GIGACHAT_API_PERS (personal, default), GIGACHAT_API_B2B, GIGACHAT_API_CORP
gigachat_fields.verify_ssl: Verify Sberbank TLS certificate (true by default; requires CA cert installed)
gigachat_fields.ca_bundle_file: Optional path to russian_trusted_root_ca_pem.crt if not installed via certifi

local_whisper_fields.device: Device to use: 'cuda', 'cpu', 'mps' (macOS), or 'auto' (auto-detects best device)
local_whisper_fields.compile_model: Enable torch.compile for 4.5x speedup on CUDA (true/false)
local_whisper_fields.use_flash_attention: Enable Flash Attention 2 for 20% additional speedup (requires flash-attn package)
local_whisper_fields.chunk_length_s: Chunk length for long-form transcription in seconds (default: 30)
local_whisper_fields.batch_size: Batch size for chunked transcription (higher = faster, more VRAM)
local_whisper_fields.lazy_loading: Load model on first use for faster startup (recommended: true)
local_whisper_fields._offline_behavior: After initial download, model works completely offline with local_files_only=True
local_whisper_fields._vram_management: Model auto-unloads from VRAM when auto-transcribe is disabled for all conversations (~3GB freed)
local_whisper_fields._cache_location: Model files cached in ~/.cache/huggingface/hub/ (~3GB download on first use)

_security_notes._comment: Best practices for API key management
recommendations: Use 'api_key_env' for cloud providers (stores keys in environment variables)
Use 'api_key' only for local providers where security is not a concern
Never commit API keys to version control
Set environment variables in your shell profile (~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc)
On Windows, use System Environment Variables or PowerShell profile
